creator: fmysh@iijmio-mail.jp
text:
On 2007/05/01, at 17:10, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of japanese/p5-Text-MeCab,
>
> Please note that PR ports/112285 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/112285
>
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>

It's Ok. Please go ahead.
